description: RFC #531 Phase 2 slice 2 — relocate the harness's own build/bootstrap assets (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml + hermes overlay, entrypoint.sh, client-slack-supervise.sh, seed-msg-bridge.sh) from the top-level .devcontainer/ into .oh/devcontainer/, repoint EVERY reference (scripts, CI workflows, the .oh/scripts/__tests__ vitest suite, eval probes, protected-paths, docs), and reduce root .devcontainer/ to a generated compat layer (devcontainer.json via .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh) plus the user-owned .env/.example.env/.harness.yaml.env. Pure relocation, NO behavior change. The runtime path /home/sandbox/harness is unchanged. CI's sandbox-boot-guard (compose config + docker build + healthcheck boot), the vitest Test job, and the eval-probe gate are the hard oracles. Five stories own DISJOINT files and run as one EDIT-only /delegate wave; the Advisor stages all git, runs the gates, commits per story.

userStories.title: Relocate build assets to .oh/devcontainer/ + fix in-file refs + .dockerignore
userStories.description: As OpenHarness, I need my build/bootstrap assets to live under .oh/devcontainer/ so the boot machinery is part of the portable control plane, not top-level repo files.
acceptanceCriteria: MOVE (filesystem `mv`, NOT `cp`+`rm`, to preserve executable bits; do NOT run git — the Advisor stages and git auto-detects renames) these six files from .devcontainer/ to .oh/devcontainer/ (mkdir -p .oh/devcontainer first): Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.hermes-dashboard.yml, entrypoint.sh, client-slack-supervise.sh, seed-msg-bridge.sh. After the move, verify with `ls -la .oh/devcontainer/` that entrypoint.sh, client-slack-supervise.sh, seed-msg-bridge.sh retain their executable (+x) bit.

Edit .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile: change the single line `COPY .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh` to `COPY .oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh`. Do NOT touch any other COPY (they are root-relative: .oh/cli/, .oh/install/, workspace/) and do NOT touch the in-image `RUN ... > /.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` line (image-internal path, not a repo path).

Edit .oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml so its relative paths resolve from the NEW dir .oh/devcontainer/: `build.context: ..` -> `build.context: ../..`; `build.dockerfile: .devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `build.dockerfile: .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`; the bind `- ..:/home/sandbox/harness` -> `- ../..:/home/sandbox/harness`. Leave the in-container healthcheck path /home/sandbox/harness/.oh/scripts/sandbox-healthcheck.sh and all environment/image/other-volumes fields unchanged.
.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.hermes-dashboard.yml is ports/environment-only with no relative paths — needs NO content edit beyond the move.

The moved scripts need NO functional path edit: entrypoint.sh references only $HARNESS/.devcontainer/.env (user env, STAYS at root) and $HARNESS/.oh/scripts/gateway.sh (unchanged); seed-msg-bridge.sh has no self-refs. For comment accuracy only, in .oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh change `# Launched by .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh ...` -> `.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh`. Do not otherwise edit entrypoint.sh / seed-msg-bridge.sh.

Edit .dockerignore: remove the now-stale negations `!.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` and `!.devcontainer/Dockerfile` (both moved out of .devcontainer/). KEEP the `.devcontainer/` exclusion line (root .devcontainer/ still holds the user .env + the compat devcontainer.json, none of which belong in the build context). Do NOT add a `.oh/` exclusion (the Dockerfile COPYs .oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh, .oh/cli/, .oh/install/ from the context).
Owns ONLY files under .oh/devcontainer/ and the root .dockerignore. Does NOT touch .oh/scripts/, root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json, CI workflows, probes, tests, or docs.

userStories.title: Repoint .oh/scripts runtime scripts + generate the root compat devcontainer.json
userStories.description: As the harness lifecycle, I need the compose wrapper, gateway, installer, and pnpm-pin check to find the relocated assets, and the root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json to be a GENERATED compat layer.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit .oh/scripts/docker-compose.sh: change the two compose `-f` paths `.devcontainer/docker-compose.yml` -> `.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml` and `.devcontainer/docker-compose.hermes-dashboard.yml` -> `.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.hermes-dashboard.yml`. Leave ENV_FILE=$REPO_DIR/.devcontainer/.env and PERSISTENT_HARNESS_ENV_FILE=$REPO_DIR/.devcontainer/.harness.yaml.env UNCHANGED (user/generated env stays at root). The header-comment mention of `.devcontainer/.env` stays (env path unchanged).

Edit .oh/scripts/gateway.sh: change the two exec/seed paths `$HARNESS/.devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh` -> `$HARNESS/.oh/devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh` and `$HARNESS/.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh` -> `$HARNESS/.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh`, plus the matching `(.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh)` comment. Leave SLACK_ENV=$HARNESS/.devcontainer/.env UNCHANGED.

Edit .oh/scripts/install.sh: change ONLY the harness-repo DETECTION test `[ -f "$REPO_CANDIDATE/.devcontainer/docker-compose.yml" ]` -> `[ -f "$REPO_CANDIDATE/.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml" ]`. Leave every `.devcontainer/.env` write/append/sed/message path UNCHANGED (user env stays at root).

Edit .oh/scripts/check-pnpm-pin.sh: change DOCKERFILE="${REPO_ROOT}/.devcontainer/Dockerfile" -> "${REPO_ROOT}/.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile", and the two comment/message strings `.devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile` (header comment line 2 + the `update ... to match` advice).
Edit .oh/scripts/maintenance/restart-openharness-tmux.sh: update the comment `Canonical fallbacks (.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh)` -> `.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` (comment accuracy only).

Create .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh (executable, `set -euo pipefail`, shellcheck-clean): regenerates the root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json compat layer from a canonical heredoc. Default run writes the file (idempotent, ends with a trailing newline). A `--check` flag writes to a temp file and `diff`s against the committed root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json, exiting 1 on drift (for the probe/CI). Resolve repo root via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` with a BASH_SOURCE-relative fallback. AMENDMENT (MF-I): the 'GENERATED — do not hand-edit' notice lives ONLY in this shell script's own comments and in .oh/README.md — NEVER inside the emitted JSON (JSON has no comments; `jq .`/JSON.parse must succeed). The emitted JSON sets EXACTLY: name 'Open Harness Sandbox', dockerComposeFile ['../.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml'], service 'sandbox', workspaceFolder '/home/sandbox/harness', remoteUser 'sandbox', and the existing customizations.vscode terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.linux 'bash'.

Run `bash .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh` so root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json is the generator's EXACT output, with dockerComposeFile repointed to ['../.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml']. It must remain valid JSON (`jq .` parses). After writing, `bash .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh --check` must exit 0 (no drift). This is the ONLY edit to root .devcontainer/ in this slice.

Owns ONLY .oh/scripts/docker-compose.sh, .oh/scripts/gateway.sh, .oh/scripts/install.sh, .oh/scripts/check-pnpm-pin.sh, .oh/scripts/maintenance/restart-openharness-tmux.sh, NEW .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh, and root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json. Does NOT touch .oh/devcontainer/, .oh/scripts/__tests__/, CI workflows, probes, or docs.

userStories.title: Repoint the .oh/scripts/__tests__ vitest suite + the docs it asserts on
userStories.description: As CI's Test job (which runs independently of the boot-guard), every vitest that hardcodes a moved .devcontainer/ path must point at .oh/devcontainer/, and the docs-compose-overlays test couples to docs that must move with it.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit .oh/scripts/__tests__/entrypoint.test.ts: line ~8 ENTRYPOINT join(ROOT, '.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh') -> '.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh'; line ~70 SUPERVISOR join(ROOT, '.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh') -> '.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh'; line ~104 expect(gateway).toContain('.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh') -> '.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh' (matches US-002's gateway.sh edit); line ~134 SEED_SCRIPT join(ROOT, '.devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh') -> '.oh/devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh'. Do not change the .oh/scripts/gateway.sh read path (line ~103, already correct).
Edit .oh/scripts/__tests__/entrypoint-pnpm-install.test.ts: line ~9 path.join(REPO_ROOT, '.devcontainer', 'entrypoint.sh') -> path.join(REPO_ROOT, '.oh', 'devcontainer', 'entrypoint.sh').

Edit .oh/scripts/__tests__/gateway.test.ts: line ~20 expect(gateway()).toContain('.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh') -> '.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh'; in the fixture, add `mkdirSync(join(harness, '.oh', 'devcontainer'), { recursive: true })` (keep the existing `mkdirSync(join(harness, '.devcontainer'))` for the .env fixture); cpSync source ROOT '.devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh' -> '.oh/devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh' and dest harness '.devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh' -> '.oh/devcontainer/seed-msg-bridge.sh'; the stub supervisor writeFileSync target join(harness, '.devcontainer', 'client-slack-supervise.sh') -> join(harness, '.oh', 'devcontainer', 'client-slack-supervise.sh'). Leave the `.env` fixture at harness '.devcontainer/.env' and the basename assertion tmuxCommand.toContain('client-slack-supervise.sh') UNCHANGED.

Edit .oh/scripts/__tests__/compose-args.test.ts: in beforeEach, ADD `mkdirSync(path.join(tmp, '.oh', 'devcontainer'), { recursive: true })` and write the two stub compose files (docker-compose.yml + docker-compose.hermes-dashboard.yml) into `tmp/.oh/devcontainer/` instead of `tmp/.devcontainer/` (KEEP the `mkdirSync(tmp/.devcontainer)` line — the .env/.harness.yaml.env fixtures still live there). Update the `-f` argv assertions (around lines 80, 112-114, 159) from path.join(tmp, '.devcontainer', 'docker-compose.yml') / '...hermes-dashboard.yml' to path.join(tmp, '.oh', 'devcontainer', 'docker-compose.yml') / '...hermes-dashboard.yml'. Leave the .env / .harness.yaml.env assertions (path.join(tmp, '.devcontainer', '.env' | '.harness.yaml.env')) UNCHANGED. Leave the line-208 `not.toContain("COMPOSE_FILES=\"-f .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml\"")` negative guard UNCHANGED (it guards the literal removed legacy form).

Edit .oh/scripts/__tests__/docs-compose-overlays.test.ts: change the scan regex (line ~24) from /\.devcontainer\/docker-compose[\w.-]*\.yml/g to /\.oh\/devcontainer\/docker-compose[\w.-]*\.yml/g so it scans for the NEW path; the `expect(refs.size).toBeGreaterThan(0)` and per-ref existsSync assertions then pass because (a) the docs below now reference .oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml and (b) that file exists after US-001's move.

Edit docs/intro.md: change both `docker compose -f .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml ...` commands (up and down) to `.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml`, and the sentence 'requires a .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml change' -> '.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml'. The phrase 'builds a sandbox image from .devcontainer/' may stay (the compat layer + build context root are still rooted there) or be nuanced; do not break prose.

Edit docs/installation.md: change every `docker compose -f .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml ...` command (lines ~80, ~138) and the line-8 'runs docker compose against .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml' to `.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml`. Update the line-113 fork-advice sentence to name the new detection path `.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml` in `.oh/scripts/install.sh` (the line-number hint is approximate; correct the path).

Repoint TWO MORE vitest files that read moved assets via the split-form path.join(ROOT, '.devcontainer', '<asset>') (invisible to a '/'-literal grep — learned from a prior independent full-vitest run): .oh/scripts/__tests__/boot-banner.test.ts — change readRepoFile('.devcontainer', 'entrypoint.sh') -> readRepoFile('.oh', 'devcontainer', 'entrypoint.sh') (the ONLY moved-asset ref; leave the .oh/install/banner.sh read); .oh/scripts/__tests__/sandbox-healthcheck.test.ts — change const COMPOSE = join(ROOT, '.devcontainer', 'docker-compose.yml') -> join(ROOT, '.oh', 'devcontainer', 'docker-compose.yml'). Leave each file's USER-env fixture join(harness, '.devcontainer', '.env') UNCHANGED.

Owns ONLY .oh/scripts/__tests__/{entrypoint.test.ts, entrypoint-pnpm-install.test.ts, gateway.test.ts, compose-args.test.ts, docs-compose-overlays.test.ts, boot-banner.test.ts, sandbox-healthcheck.test.ts}, docs/intro.md, docs/installation.md. Does NOT touch .oh/scripts/*.sh, .oh/devcontainer/, harness-config.test.ts (its .a.yml/.b.yml override fixtures are fictional parser inputs — leave them), CI workflows, probes, or other docs.

userStories.title: Repoint CI workflows + boot probes + protected-paths + add the guard probe
userStories.description: As CI, I must lint/build the relocated Dockerfile/scripts, the boot probes must assert the new paths, the protected-paths guard must track the moved files, and a new probe must lock the relocation contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml boot-lint job: in the `shellcheck -S warning ...` line replace `.devcontainer/*.sh` with `.oh/devcontainer/*.sh` (root .devcontainer/ has no .sh after the move, so the old glob errors on zero matches); keep `.oh/install/*.sh .oh/scripts/*.sh` and the rest. Change the hadolint step `dockerfile: .devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`.

Edit .github/workflows/release.yml: in the `shellcheck -S warning` line `.devcontainer/*.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/*.sh`; the hadolint `dockerfile: .devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`; and the release build `docker build -f .devcontainer/Dockerfile -t $IMAGE -t $LATEST .` -> `docker build -f .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile -t $IMAGE -t $LATEST .`.

Edit .github/workflows/sandbox-boot-guard.yml: change the local build `--file .devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `--file .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`. KEEP the `.devcontainer/**` push/pull path filters (root compat layer + user env still live there); `.oh/**` already covers the new location — remove neither.
Edit .hadolint.yaml: header comment `gates .devcontainer/Dockerfile in CI` -> `gates .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile in CI`.

Edit evals/probes/boot-lint-glob.sh: change `for dir in .devcontainer/ .oh/install/ .oh/scripts/;` to `for dir in .oh/devcontainer/ .oh/install/ .oh/scripts/;` and update the final PASS message dir list to match. (Pairs with the ci-harness.yml + release.yml shellcheck-glob edits so the probe stays green.)

Edit evals/probes/sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh: change `has '--file .devcontainer/Dockerfile' "devcontainer Dockerfile build target"` to `has '--file .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile' "devcontainer Dockerfile build target"`. Leave the `has '".devcontainer/**"' ...` path-filter assertion UNCHANGED (root compat layer keeps it valid). Verify the new `--file .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile` string does NOT trip the workflow's anti-registry grep regex.

Edit evals/probes/cron-watchdog.sh: line ~8 ENTRYPOINT="$ROOT/.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh" -> "$ROOT/.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh". Leave the TESTS="$ROOT/.oh/scripts/__tests__/entrypoint.test.ts" path UNCHANGED (the test file does not move).

Edit .claude/protected-paths.txt: replace the two entries `.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` and `.devcontainer/Dockerfile` with `.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` and `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile` (track the moved files; preserve the rest of the file and ordering).

Create evals/probes/oh-devcontainer-restructure.sh — 3-state oracle (exit 0 PASS / 1 REGRESSION / 2 SKIPPED) with header `# tier: A`, `# source: issue #531 Phase 2 (devcontainer relocation)`, `# desc: ...`. Self-resolve repo root via ${BASH_SOURCE[0]}. SKIPPED(2) if .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile is absent. PASS asserts ALL: the six assets exist under .oh/devcontainer/; the MOVED assets are GONE from .devcontainer/ (no .devcontainer/Dockerfile, no .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml, no .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh); root .devcontainer/devcontainer.json exists and contains '../.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml'; .oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml contains 'dockerfile: .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile'; .oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile contains 'COPY .oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh'; .dockerignore does NOT contain '.devcontainer/Dockerfile'; AND, when .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh is present, `bash .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh --check` exits 0 (no generator drift). REGRESSION(1) with a one-line stderr reason on any failed positive assertion. One-line stderr reason for every outcome. shellcheck clean.

Owns ONLY .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml, .github/workflows/release.yml, .github/workflows/sandbox-boot-guard.yml, .hadolint.yaml, evals/probes/boot-lint-glob.sh, evals/probes/sandbox-boot-guard-ci.sh, evals/probes/cron-watchdog.sh, .claude/protected-paths.txt, NEW evals/probes/oh-devcontainer-restructure.sh. Does NOT touch .oh/devcontainer/, .oh/scripts/, root .devcontainer/, RESULTS.md, CHANGELOG, or docs.

userStories.title: Doc sweep + CHANGELOG + RESULTS row
userStories.description: As OpenHarness, every remaining accurate-reference doc must name the new .oh/devcontainer/ location, and the relocation must be recorded in the changelog and the eval benchmark.
acceptanceCriteria: Insert ONE new row into evals/RESULTS.md alphabetically: `| oh-devcontainer-restructure | A | 2026-06-27 00:00 | PASS | issue #531 Phase 2 (devcontainer relocation) 2026-06-27 |` (match the existing column shape). Do NOT alter any other row's timestamp/status.

Add a CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] ### Changed entry: the harness devcontainer build assets relocated from .devcontainer/ to .oh/devcontainer/, with root .devcontainer/ reduced to a generated compat layer (devcontainer.json via .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh) + the user-owned .env; link the full URL https://github.com/mifunedev/openharness/issues/531 (NOT bare #531); note it is a no-behavior-change relocation validated by the sandbox boot-guard.

Edit .oh/README.md: (a) line ~61 `Docker COPY (.devcontainer/Dockerfile) — copies from .oh/cli/ and .oh/install/` -> `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`; (b) the §'Why these specifically stay at root' .devcontainer/ bullet (~86-89) — reword so it states root .devcontainer/ is now a THIN COMPAT LAYER (the VS Code devcontainer.json generated by .oh/scripts/sync-devcontainer.sh + the user-owned .env), pinned to root by the devcontainer spec/.dockerignore/hadolint, while the build assets (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml + hermes overlay, entrypoint.sh, the two client scripts) now live at .oh/devcontainer/; (c) add a short `## devcontainer layout (Phase 2 slice 2)` section summarizing the split and noting .oh/templates/.devcontainer/ (slice 1) is the SEPARATE downstream scaffold.

Surgically repoint the moved-asset references (path prefix only — do NOT touch `.devcontainer/.env`, `.devcontainer/.harness.yaml.env`, or `.devcontainer/**` CI-filter mentions) in: root AGENTS.md (line ~77 `.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh`); docs/integrations/slack.md (`.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh`, `.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh`); docs/integrations/debugmcp.md (`.devcontainer/Dockerfile` -> `.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile`, keeping the :LINE suffixes); crons/README.md (`.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh`); .mifune/skills/harness-audit/SKILL.md (`.devcontainer/docker-compose.yml`, `.devcontainer/docker-compose*.yml`, `.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/...`); .mifune/skills/harness-context/references/hermes-state-auth-split.md (`.devcontainer/docker-compose.yml`, `.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/...`); .pi/UPSTREAM.md (`.devcontainer/entrypoint.sh`, `.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/...`); .pi/bridge-recovery/index.ts (line ~14 comment `.devcontainer/client-slack-supervise.sh` -> `.oh/devcontainer/...`); context/TOOLS.md (line ~3 'Regenerate when .devcontainer/Dockerfile ...' -> '.oh/devcontainer/Dockerfile'; line ~35 'cron-watchdog — .devcontainer/entrypoint.sh supervisor' -> '.oh/devcontainer/entrypoint.sh'); docs/harnesses/pi.md (line ~20 'The base .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml publishes ...' -> '.oh/devcontainer/docker-compose.yml').

Do NOT edit (documented as a deliberate tail in the PR): .oh/install/banner.sh (cosmetic jq prefix-strip; boot-banner.test.ts covers it), harness.yaml line-58 commented example, blog/** (archival), tasks/** historical PRDs, .oh/scripts/__tests__/harness-config.test.ts (fictional override fixtures). These are cosmetic/archival.

Owns ONLY evals/RESULTS.md, CHANGELOG.md, .oh/README.md, root AGENTS.md, docs/integrations/slack.md, docs/integrations/debugmcp.md, crons/README.md, .mifune/skills/harness-audit/SKILL.md, .mifune/skills/harness-context/references/hermes-state-auth-split.md, .pi/UPSTREAM.md, .pi/bridge-recovery/index.ts, context/TOOLS.md, docs/harnesses/pi.md. Does NOT touch .oh/devcontainer/, .oh/scripts/, root .devcontainer/, CI workflows, probes, or the vitest suite.
